'''sajaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ohel|ohel]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-j-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ohel|ohel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sajaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæjæyæth|sæjæyæth]] || [[word:sæjæyæj|sæjæyæj]] || [[word:sæjæyæsh|sæjæyæsh]] || [[word:sæjæyæ|sæjæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sajajayath|sajajayath]] || [[word:sajajayaj|sajajayaj]] || [[word:sajajayash|sajajayash]] || [[word:sajajaya|sajajaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sajayath|sajayath]] || [[word:sajayaj|sajayaj]] || [[word:sajayash|sajayash]] || [[word:sajaya|sajaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sajafyath|sajafyath]] || [[word:sajafyaj|sajafyaj]] || [[word:sajafyash|sajafyash]] || [[word:sajafyaf|sajafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sajayatha|sajayatha]] || [[word:sajayaja|sajayaja]] || [[word:sajayasha|sajayasha]] || [[word:sajayaka|sajayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sajayath|sajayath]] || [[word:sajayaj|sajayaj]] || [[word:sajayash|sajayash]] || [[word:sajaya|sajaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sajayathal|sajayathal]] || [[word:sajayajal|sajayajal]] || [[word:sajayashal|sajayashal]] || [[word:sajayakal|sajayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sajayathatha|sajayathatha]] || [[word:sajayajaja|sajayajaja]] || [[word:sajayashasha|sajayashasha]] || [[word:sajayaka|sajayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sajayathan|sajayathan]] || [[word:sajayajan|sajayajan]] || [[word:sajayashan|sajayashan]] || [[word:sajayakan|sajayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sajayathaoro|sajayathaoro]] || [[word:sajayajaoro|sajayajaoro]] || [[word:sajayashaoro|sajayashaoro]] || [[word:sajayakaoro|sajayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
